[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Reelo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] present on [[Carrick Station]] during the [[Sith Wars/Legends|struggle]] against the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].<ref name="TOR" />

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]''
